title: Seek staged core smoke bootstrap env propagation
summary: Extend the existing governance env bootstrap surface so Seek and Ponder generated env files include seeded-login staged smoke credential names required after governed Pages deploy.
acceptance_criteria: Seek bootstrap targets emit staged core smoke seeded-login names without printing or committing secret values.
Bootstrap contract, execution scope, provisioning evidence, structured plan, closeout, and Local CI Gate checks pass.
Live deploy proof remains delegated to the existing hldpro-governance #471 / seek-and-ponder #163 downstream deployment lane.
